meta.title: Refund Policy | AWSOverseas
meta.description: Understand the refund process and eligibility for AWSOverseas logistics services.

hero.title: Refund Policy
hero.subtitle: Our refund policy explains when refunds may be issued and how they are processed.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: Refund requests will be reviewed based on the service purchased and the stage of shipment processing.

sections.title: Non-Refundable Charges
sections.content: Government taxes, customs duties, third-party charges, and completed logistics services are generally non-refundable.

sections.title: Refund Processing
sections.content: Approved refunds will be processed using the original payment method or credited to the customer's wallet where applicable.

sections.title: Processing Time
sections.content: Refunds are generally processed within 7–14 business days after approval.

sections.title: Cancellation
sections.content: Shipment cancellations may be subject to administrative or operational charges depending on the shipment stage.

sections.title: Support
sections.content: For refund-related questions, please contact our customer support team.
